rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Separate Trial Of Plaintiffs' Case Against Defendant Kevin O'Connor
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 7, 2024 line 1. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR A SEPARATE TRIAL OF PLAINTIFFS' CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT KEVIN O'CONNOR is OFF CALENDAR, moot in light of March 5, 2024 order. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JIE YING LI ET AL VS. CRAIG S. CHIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 7, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANTS CAROLYN CHIN, STEPHANIE CHAN, SIMON WONG, CRAIG CHAN AND HOGAN & VEST, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 1941.1 is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that this is a recognized stand-alone cause of action independent and not duplicative of other causes of action, e.g. violation of CC 1942.4 and negligence. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 1942.4 by the property manager defendants is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts supporting liability of these defendants as "landlords" under the code. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: LA SALLE PRESERVATION LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. CHYNA SMITH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Defendant As The Prevailing Party
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 7, 2024 line 5. DEFENDANT CHYNA SMITH'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF DEFENDANT AS THE PREVAILING PARTY is GRANTED. Defendant is the prevailing party under CCP 1032 as a defendant in whose favor a dismissal is entered. Defendant to prepare a proposed judgment and file a Memorandum of Costs per Code of Civil Procedure. The Court makes no determination as to the entitlement to any specific costs. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
